subject: Zen-Oh (Zeno) holding his universe-erase button, depicted as a small round-headed blue figure
description: A small, compact figure with a round, oversized head and blue-toned skin sits or stands at center frame. The head is distinctively spherical with minimal facial features visible, and the figure wears a pink-and-white robe or costume. A small button or device is visible being held by the figure. The card name is 'Zen-Oh Button' and the figure depicted is Zen-Oh himself rather than just a product image of the button. The composition is a close-up centered on the figure against a dark background, giving the small figure an oddly imposing presence despite its cute, almost childlike design.
foreground: small round-headed blue-skinned figure in pink-white robe holding a small button
